purpose: Cross-study metric governance for display, export, and assistant-generated study behavior.

statuses.headline: Primary user-facing truth for the study context. Safe to summarize first.
statuses.diagnostic: Useful supporting evidence. Show sample size, caveat, or calculation context.
statuses.suppressed: Do not display or export as a metric value until the required evidence threshold is met.

rules.label: Total Return
rules.headlineWhen: Always safe as the primary period-return truth.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Can move to diagnostic when a full annualized return clears headline thresholds.
rules.suppressedWhen: Never suppressed when the period return is computable.
rules.exportBehavior: Exportable with the same label used in the study view.

rules.label: CAGR / Annualized Pace
rules.headlineWhen: Calendar window is at least 365 days and has at least 200 return observations.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Window or return sample is thin; label as Annualized Pace instead of CAGR.
rules.suppressedWhen: Never suppressed when computable, but must not headline below thresholds.
rules.exportBehavior: Export as CAGR only when headline-eligible; otherwise export as Annualized Pace.

rules.label: Calmar Ratio
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default; it depends on annualized return.
rules.suppressedWhen: Use Return / Max DD instead when annualized return is too fragile.
rules.exportBehavior: Export as Calmar Ratio only when annualized return is headline-eligible.

rules.label: Return / Max DD
rules.headlineWhen: Use on short or thin windows instead of Calmar.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Usually replaced by Calmar once annualized return clears thresholds.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed when total return or max drawdown is unavailable.
rules.exportBehavior: Export only when Calmar is not appropriate.

rules.label: Volatility
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default; it is distribution context, not return outcome.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Always show with return-observation count when computable.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed when return observations are unavailable.

rules.label: Sharpe Ratio
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default because annualized ratios imply precision.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Show with return-observation count and risk-free-rate context.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed when volatility or excess return cannot be computed.

rules.label: Sortino Ratio
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default because annualized downside ratios imply precision.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Show with return-observation count and downside-deviation context.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed when downside deviation or excess return cannot be computed.

rules.label: Relative Wealth
rules.headlineWhen: Always safe as terminal wealth difference across the overlap.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Rarely diagnostic; it is the primary relative-performance truth.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when aligned overlap cannot be computed.

rules.label: Active Return
rules.headlineWhen: Safe as asset total return minus benchmark total return across the overlap.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Can support relative wealth when a view has limited headline space.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when aligned overlap cannot be computed.

rules.label: CAGR Spread / Annualized Pace Spread
rules.headlineWhen: Overlap is at least 365 days and has at least 200 aligned return observations.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Overlap is short or thin; label as Annualized Pace Spread.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when aligned annualized returns cannot be computed.
rules.exportBehavior: Export with the label selected by the annualization policy.

rules.label: Historical Percentile
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default; percentiles are context metrics.
rules.diagnosticWhen: At least 20 comparable history observations exist.
rules.suppressedWhen: Fewer than 20 comparable history observations exist.
rules.exportBehavior: Export blank values while suppressed; export percentile values only after depth clears.

rules.label: Sample Depth
rules.headlineWhen: Use monthly row count and bucket depth as the primary confidence read.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Never demote below years observed for thin samples.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when no monthly rows exist.
rules.exportBehavior: Export monthly rows and bucket-depth fields.

rules.label: Years Observed
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline by default because partial years can overstate sample depth.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Use as context beside bucket observations.
rules.exportBehavior: Exportable as context, not as the primary confidence headline.

rules.label: Material Drawdowns
rules.headlineWhen: Episode count uses the materiality threshold to avoid microscopic noise.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Raw underwater path remains diagnostic context.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when the series cannot form drawdown episodes.
rules.exportBehavior: Export threshold and material episode counts together.

rules.label: Cohort XIRR
rules.headlineWhen: Do not headline alone when cohorts have different contribution counts.
rules.diagnosticWhen: Use with terminal value and visible contribution count.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when cash flows cannot form XIRR.
rules.exportBehavior: Export with same-terminal cohort comparison note.

rules.label: Terminal Wealth
rules.headlineWhen: Always the win criterion for lumpsum versus SIP cohorts.
rules.diagnosticWhen: CAGR and XIRR remain diagnostic because capital timing differs.
rules.suppressedWhen: Suppressed only when cohort terminal values cannot be computed.
rules.exportBehavior: Export win criterion and return-rate caveat together.
